🟢 Under control

🆕 New since last digest

  • INC-14082 — P2, opened 07:09 — lead triaged fast, root cause (RDS T4G downgrade) found in 34min, partner comms just announced
  • INC-14069 — P2, opened 05:45 — root cause found, partner system being decommissioned this week, no comms needed
  • INC-14077 — P3, opened 06:27 — known ping-pong noise pattern, lead assigned, no flags

✅ Resolved since last digest

  • none

📋 Overnight handover

  • INC-13895 Fusion API Spinbet Terragon — flagged unresolved across 4 consecutive shifts — tracked INC-13895, assigned to Nazareno ✅ (but chronic no-progress, see 🔴)
  • INC-13853 Rhino 'false P1' waiting on partner feedback — tracked INC-13853, assigned to Giancarlo ✅ (now resolved, see 🟡)
  • INC-14039 Maxima disk-space fix ('SRE please expand disk volume and persist the change') — tracked INC-14039, but the specific ask has no named assignee ❌ (B8) — fix has since been applied by Joachim, persistence unconfirmed
  • INC-14030 Hizlicasino RDS upgrade review / grant SOC scaling access — incident itself closed & assigned (Gérard) ✅, but the follow-up ask (RDS upgrade review / SOC scaling access) has no named owner ❌ (B8)
  • Shuffle backoffice access issue, 06:12 CET 15 Jul, no reply received — no matching incident.io ticket found ⚠

🚨 Escalate now 5

INC-8064 slack intercomP1open 49d
[P1] Intercom Incident : H2Bet Production

B5/A4: 50 days unresolved with confirmed ~300/week duplicate bonus leakage; BetConstruct escalation has zero traction and the Rewards team's own Urgent ticket is parked until mid-Aug.

H2Bet duplicate bonus grants confirmed root cause quickly, but 50 days later still ~300 duplicate grants/week with no fix deployed. BetConstruct account-manager gap means zero external traction since 5 Jun. Rewards team's own Urgent ticket (REW-176) blocked by capacity until mid-Aug. No new activity found.

Open breaches
  • A2/A4: no decisive fix after 50 days, Urgent ticket parked a month+
  • A3: minimizing language contradicts confirmed weekly leakage
  • B5: BetConstruct escalation zero traction
  • C10/D15: Intercom closed twice implying resolution while incident.io still open P1
Proposed / pending
  • 503-as-success workaround - rejected
  • PR #122 idempotency fix - closed unmerged
  • PR #123 observability only - merged, no fix
  • REW-176 interim workaround - Urgent, blocked until mid-Aug
Partner view
  • first reported 2026-05-26T14:40
  • temp solution being arranged - blocked until mid-Aug
  • no ETA ever committed for root fix
Timeline (6)
  • 26 May: root cause ID'd same day
  • 05 Jun: BetConstruct outreach dead-ends
  • 11 Jun: confirmed ~300/week duplicates ongoing
  • 06 Jul: Rewards says no capacity until mid-Aug; Intercom closed by Andrea Azzopardi
  • 09 Jul: REW-176 created Urgent, blocked by capacity
  • 15 Jul: no change

→ Escalate BetConstruct outreach to a named leadership owner today, and push Rewards to scope a stop-gap sooner than mid-Aug given confirmed ongoing weekly financial leakage.

INC-12436 slack intercomP2open 9d
[P3] Intercom Incident : Tuohi Production

B5/A4/C9/D15: partner signaled proceeding with termination over this issue with no trace in incident.io; the real fix is only 'prepared', not confirmed deployed; a 14 Jul recurrence remains unanswered.

223+ Tuohi/Noppa players missed welcome offers due to a lifecycle-entry race condition. Partner told FT internally they were 'proceeding with their termination' over this - never reflected in incident.io. Fix (Kafka switch) was explicitly 'step 1' only; the same defect recurred 14 Jul and remains unanswered.

Open breaches
  • B5: 2-day lag between termination signal and severity escalation
  • A4: defect recurring 8 days in, after only deployed fix
  • C9/C10: 14 Jul recurrence report unanswered
  • D15: incident.io materially rosier than Slack/Intercom reality
Proposed / pending
  • alternative LC trigger - offered
  • PR #58 crash-loop fix - opened
  • synchronous deposit-listener arming (real fix) - only 'prepared', not confirmed deployed
  • Kafka integration switch - deployed but insufficient alone
Partner view
  • first reported 2026-07-02T18:12
  • last partner message unanswered
  • alternative LC trigger offered
  • verbal commitment to cover in 14 Jul call - not confirmed happened
Timeline (6)
  • 06 Jul: INC-12436 created P3
  • 07 Jul: true scope found, 223 users
  • 08 Jul: partner signals termination internally, severity raised P3->P2 two days later
  • 13 Jul: Kafka switch deployed, 'step 1' only
  • 14 Jul: new missing/delayed offers reported, unanswered since
  • 15 Jul: no new activity, recurrence still unanswered

→ Escalate to leadership given the explicit partner termination risk; confirm whether the synchronous deposit-listener fix is actually deployed; respond to the 14 Jul recurrence immediately.

INC-12998 slackP2open 5d
frank-casino: deployment ping-pong is stuck on CrashLoopBackOff

B7/D15/D13: a critical-path crash-loop has been open 5.7+ days with a blank incident.io summary, zero diagnostic content anywhere, and the current lead has left the channel while it remains unresolved.

frank-casino deployment stuck in CrashLoopBackOff. incident.io summary confirmed still blank. Entire Slack channel contains zero human diagnostic content. Original lead left within 5h with no findings; current lead (Giancarlo Laferla) also left the channel 14 Jul with the incident still open, and no new activity has appeared since.

Open breaches
  • D15: blank incident.io summary
  • B7: no visible prioritized action on a critical-path crash-loop now over 5.7 days
  • B5: ~20h escalation-to-accept gap, undocumented lead handoff
  • D13: zero runbook/basic-check evidence anywhere
Timeline (5)
  • 09 Jul: alert fires, lead auto-paged, leaves channel same evening
  • 10 Jul: lead reassigned to Giancarlo ~20h after report
  • 12 Jul: bot nudge unanswered
  • 14 Jul: current lead leaves channel, incident still open
  • 15 Jul: summary still blank, no new activity

→ Escalate immediately to an engineering lead who will actively work the incident in-channel; require a documented root-cause check and a populated incident.io summary without further delay.

INC-13738 slackP2open 42h
Betiro - No unsubs since April 2026

D12/A4: a ~3-month undetected opt-out failure across gambling brands still has no legal/compliance escalation, and the team is now closing partner threads without remediating 3 newly-flagged brands.

IP-whitelisting change from ~6 Apr silently blocked unsubscribe requests for Betiro, Rivalo, Leonbets since 7 Apr - undetected ~3 months. Fix merged 13 Jul, but no legal/compliance escalation. New: Giancarlo reports the team is quietly closing partner threads (Betiro/Rivalo 'considered closed') without addressing the 3 additional brands (Rocketship, Fairspin, Frank Casino) flagged by the environment sweep.

Open breaches
  • A4: ~3-month undetected compliance-relevant failure, no pre-existing monitoring
  • D12: no legal/compliance escalation for a multi-month opt-out failure across 3 gambling brands
  • C10: no confirmed retroactive remediation of missed unsubscribes
  • A2/A3: minimizing language, suspicious consent-event drop dismissed
  • new: team closing partner threads without addressing 3 additional flagged brands or legal escalation
Proposed / pending
  • exempt unsubscribe endpoint from IP whitelist - done, merged 13 Jul
  • zero-unsub-event monitoring - in progress, not live
Timeline (4)
  • 06 Apr: IP whitelisting change introduced without forwarding-header exemption
  • 13 Jul: incident created, fix merged (PR #91)
  • 14 Jul: status -> Monitoring; zero-unsub-event monitor proposed, mid-design
  • 15 Jul 09:45 CEST: Giancarlo reports Betiro/Rivalo 'considered closed', Leonbets pending - no mention of 3 additional flagged brands or legal escalation

→ Escalate to legal/compliance for the multi-month opt-out failure before declaring partner threads closed, and open remediation for the 3 newly-flagged brands instead of quietly winding down Betiro/Rivalo.

INC-5630 slackP3open 75d
Coinbar SMS Issues with Credit

A4/D12: 2.5+ months of pure automated alert churn with zero human decision-making since 29 May; the incident keeps absorbing new alerts (2 more on 15 Jul alone) with no owner actually progressing it.

SMS distributor service has not processed queued messages for all Coinbar brands since before 30 Apr - over 1M messages backlogged. Root cause (external SMS provider outage) identified immediately, but 2.5+ months later there is zero forward progress; two more brand alerts (Hizlicasino) auto-merged in on 15 Jul, and no human commentary since 29 May (47 days).

Open breaches
  • A4: chronic multi-month issue never escalated to a decisive fix or vendor-management track - now 47 days of pure automated churn
  • D12/D15: the one substantive question raised (29 May) never answered or tracked - Lead rotated to at least a 6th person, new alerts keep merging in unattended
Proposed / pending
  • Escalate to SMS provider - done repeatedly, no concrete response ever
  • Gustav Tjäder asked to advise next course of action (29 May) - never answered
Timeline (5)
  • 30 Apr: incident created, 1M+ message backlog
  • 25-29 May: Andrea Azzopardi repeatedly asks for an explanation, no answer for 4 days
  • 29 May: lead explains 'not much to do from SOC', pulls in Gustav Tjäder - never answered
  • 14 Jul: Lead reassigned again to James Hodgson, no substantive update since 29 May
  • 15 Jul: two more Hizlicasino alerts auto-merged in, 50+ alerts auto-resolved twice - 47 days of pure automation

→ Force a decision: escalate to account/vendor management for a binding SMS-provider ETA or a migration decision, and assign a named owner who must respond rather than letting the lead rotate unattended.

🔴 Needs attention 10

INC-11707 slack intercomP1open 13d
[P1] Intercom Incident : Betpipo Production

C10/D15: partner's 10 Jul question still has no visible customer-facing reply (only an internal note), now 5 days unanswered; status stuck 'Investigating' since 06 Jul despite piecemeal PR work.

Betpipo partner reported repeated logouts from 26 Jun; root cause found (shared UserTokens table collision). Two of 4 approved fix PRs merged overnight 15 Jul but these are diagnostic/observability groundwork, not the core IsAdminToken-scoping fix. An internal note logs a request for the partner to confirm if still happening, but it was posted as an internal note, not a customer-facing reply.

Open breaches
  • C10: partner's 10 Jul question still has no visible customer-facing reply, now 5 days unanswered
  • A2/A3: 'stabilized' framing repeatedly contradicted by recurrence
  • D15: status stuck 'Investigating' since 06 Jul despite piecemeal PR work
Proposed / pending
  • disable AUTH_IP_BINDING - insufficient
  • scope token invalidation to IsAdminToken (4 PRs) - 2 of 4 merged 15 Jul (diagnostics only), core fix not confirmed deployed
Partner view
  • first reported 2026-06-26T09:08
  • last partner message unanswered
  • multiple 'stabilized' claims (01,03,06 Jul) all contradicted by recurrence
Timeline (5)
  • 01 Jul: first fix declared to stabilize, closed same day
  • 03/06 Jul: reopened, recurring
  • 10-13 Jul: real root cause found (UserTokens collision), 4 PRs approved
  • 15 Jul 06:16 UTC: 2 of 4 PRs merged (logging/diagnostics only)
  • 15 Jul 07:24 UTC: internal note asks partner to confirm status - not sent as customer-facing reply

→ Post an actual customer-facing reply to the partner's 10 Jul question (not just an internal note), and get a firm date for merging/deploying the remaining IsAdminToken-scoping PRs.

INC-12022 slack intercomP1open 12d
Shortlinks Redirecting to "Forbidden" page

C10: partner (Estelarbet/PLIN) waiting 12+ days for a promised RCA report with 2 broken 'update tomorrow' promises; today's (15 Jul) promised date has arrived with nothing sent yet.

Cloudflare-origin security check blocked legitimate shortlink/unsubscribe traffic on 2 Jul; mitigated within ~2h, root-cause fix merged same evening. Partner (Estelarbet/PLIN) has been waiting 12+ days for a promised RCA report, with two broken 'update tomorrow' promises; today (15 Jul) is the latest promised date and nothing has been sent yet.

Open breaches
  • C10: partner RCA report 12+ days overdue, 2 broken promises
  • D15: incident.io status timestamps misrepresent when fix landed
  • A4: same CF/unsub-blocking pattern recurring across 3 incidents (also see INC-13738)
Proposed / pending
  • CF-origin carve-out - merged 02 Jul
  • file-serving revert - merged 02 Jul
  • deliver full partner report - still pending
Partner view
  • first reported 2026-07-02T13:29
  • last partner message unanswered
  • RCA/report promised repeatedly, still not delivered; next promised 15 Jul (today)
Timeline (5)
  • 02 Jul: fixes merged same day
  • 06 Jul: status moved Investigating->Fixing 4 days late
  • 10 Jul: status -> Monitoring
  • 13-14 Jul: two more broken 'update tomorrow' promises, next promised 15 Jul
  • 15 Jul: no new activity, promised date arrived with nothing sent

→ Send the overdue RCA report to Estelarbet/PLIN today as promised, or proactively communicate a concrete new date — a third broken promise would be a serious trust issue.

INC-10045 slack intercomP2open 26d
[P2] Intercom Incident : Power Play Production

C10/D15: the update_epoch permanent fix has been recommended twice but is confirmed via follow_up_list to have zero incident.io tracking; record not updated to reflect the reopen/recurrence history.

GiG (Power Play's upstream KYC) event-ordering bug leaves stale block tags, blocking new-player journeys. incident.io was closed 6 Jul against the partner's explicit stay-open request, forcing a reopen 10 Jul. follow_up_list confirms zero follow-ups exist for this incident, including the update_epoch permanent fix recommended twice.

Open breaches
  • C10: update_epoch fix recommended twice, zero incident.io follow-ups (confirmed)
  • D15: summary/fields not updated to reflect reopen, recurrence, or 14 Jul status flip
  • C11: closed against explicit partner request 6 Jul causing an avoidable reopen
Proposed / pending
  • historical re-sync - done multiple rounds
  • GiG source-side tag fix - partial, ONT/119 still pending
  • update_epoch as ordering key - proposed twice, zero incident.io follow-ups tracking it
Partner view
  • first reported 2026-06-16T12:16
  • notify once re-syncs complete - kept
  • evaluate update_epoch reordering fix - in progress, no ticket yet
Timeline (5)
  • 18 Jun: root cause validated same day, 722 users affected
  • 06 Jul: closed against partner's explicit stay-open request
  • 10 Jul: partner reopens with new ONT/119 issue
  • 13 Jul: still ~8 new stuck accounts/week, update_epoch fix proposed again
  • 14 Jul 06:54 UTC: status moved back to 'Waiting on Partner'; zero tracked follow-ups confirmed

→ Create a tracked incident.io follow-up for the update_epoch fix with an owner and due date before this cycles through another close/reopen.

INC-11079 slackP2open 18d
segurobet: no consumers on queue segurobet.consentsmanager

C9/B5: partner admitted being 'at a loss' 6 days ago with zero FT-side chase since; no escalation to account/partner management despite 18-day duration and this being the 3rd BetConstruct reliability incident in 5 weeks.

Segurobet Consent Manager queue stalled since 27 Jun due to partner's (BetConstruct/Betco) Operator API 500s. Partner admitted 9 Jul they're 'at a loss', no ETA ever given. 3rd segurobet/BetConstruct reliability incident in ~5 weeks, never escalated to account management. No chase since 10 Jul; follow_up_list confirms zero follow-ups exist.

Partner view

  • 01-06 Jul: repeated chases, non-committal replies
  • 09 Jul: partner admits 'at a loss'
  • 10 Jul: last substantive chase
  • 15 Jul: no new activity since 10 Jul - 6 days total silence, 18 days total duration

→ Escalate to account/partner management for a binding ETA from BetConstruct's Operator API team, and have a human confirm actual recovery rather than relying on the auto-resolved alert.

INC-12617 slackP2open 7d
[FIRING:3] Fusion API errors Alerting

C9/C10/B5/A4: partner informed once 07 Jul and never re-chased in 8+ days; alert auto-resolved 5 days ago with no formal closure; same pattern has since recurred as INC-13895.

Fusion API 401 errors; root cause ruled out as FT-side, partner informed via Teams DM 07 Jul and never re-chased since. Bot flagged silent-close risk twice; manual escalation by Andrea Azzopardi produced no response. Same alert family recurred a week later as INC-13895. No new activity.

  • 13 Jul: underlying alert auto-resolves, no closure comms

→ Have the lead re-chase the partner directly, formally close the incident since the underlying alert cleared 5 days ago, and escalate the recurring Fusion API 401 pattern to the owning team.

INC-13176 slack intercomP2open 4d
[P2] Intercom Incident : Campeon Nexto Production

C10/D15: fix is deployed and partner-confirmed with the Intercom ticket closed, yet incident.io still shows 'Investigating', and a second untracked bug (get_segments overflow) has no follow-up.

AI-agent Bedrock tool-name validation error bricked a Campeon Nexto partner's conversation thread. Fix (PR #459) merged and deployed by 14 Jul, partner confirmed working, Intercom ticket closed - but incident.io still shows 'Investigating'. A second bug (get_segments context overflow) surfaced, worked around manually, no follow-up tracked.

Open breaches
  • C10: incident.io stuck 'Investigating' despite confirmed resolution ~1 day ago
  • D15: second bug and its manual workaround entirely absent from incident.io record
Proposed / pending
  • sanitize Bedrock tool-call names - implemented, PR #459
  • fix get_segments context overflow - manual workaround only, no follow-up ticket
Partner view
  • first reported 2026-07-10T09:26
  • fix deployed 14 Jul - confirmed working
Timeline (3)
  • 10 Jul: root cause found ~4h after alert, PR #459 opened
  • 13 Jul: PR merged
  • 14 Jul: deployed, partner confirms fix works, ticket closed; second bug found and worked around

→ Update incident.io to Resolved/Closed to match the confirmed fix, and open a separate follow-up ticket for the get_segments overflow bug so it isn't lost.

INC-13757 slackP2open 39h
Campeon: Incorrect games mappings

D15/B8: incident.io hasn't been updated since creation despite brand-wide scope, and the vacationing outgoing Lead's handover to Sam Lundborg was only announced in Slack, never reassigned in the record.

Incorrect game mappings for Campeon escalated from one player to brand-wide (113-114/114 origins, ~67.5k rows) with a confirmed crm-api resolver bug also hitting gembet/wsm-casino; PRs #2509/#2510 unmerged. Daniel Lindengren handed off to Sam Lundborg via Slack before vacation and opened REW-188 for a related bug with an untested PR - Linus Tornberg tested it live and confirmed it does NOT fix the issue. incident.io unchanged since creation; Daniel still listed as Lead.

Open breaches
  • D15: incident.io not refreshed since creation despite scope escalating to brand-wide/multi-brand
  • D12: true scope/remediation status only visible in Slack
  • B8: outgoing Lead (Daniel, now on vacation) handed off to Sam Lundborg only via Slack - incident.io still lists Daniel as Lead
  • unresolved time-sensitive customer impact: stuck player's challenge nearing expiry with no confirmed retro-credit
  • REW-188 candidate fix tested and confirmed broken, fix path now unclear
Proposed / pending
  • merge PR #2509 (deterministic resolver) - open
  • merge PR #2510 (reconcile endpoint) - open
  • REW-188 backoffice PR - tested 15 Jul, confirmed NOT to fix the issue
  • manual retro-credit for stuck player - flagged, not actioned
Timeline (4)
  • 13 Jul: incident created (one player), scope found brand-wide same evening
  • 14 Jul: crm-api resolver bug confirmed, PRs #2509/#2510 opened, unmerged
  • 15 Jul 08:21-08:38 CEST: Daniel hands off to Sam Lundborg via Slack, opens REW-188
  • 15 Jul 08:21-08:44 CEST: Linus tests REW-188 PR live, confirms it does not solve the issue

→ Formally reassign Incident Lead to Sam Lundborg in incident.io, post a status update reflecting brand-wide scope and the failed REW-188 fix, and confirm the stuck player's retro-credit before challenge expiry.

INC-13893 slack intercomP2open 23h
[P2] Intercom Incident : Tuohi Production

C10/C11: partner was given a fix explanation engineers privately concluded doesn't work, and the correction has still not been sent a day later.

Tuohi LC39 players missed bonuses, a likely regression of INC-12436's race-condition bug class. Root cause found and code-verified, but the scaling 'fix' given to the partner was later found by engineers not to actually work, and that correction was never sent back. No new activity since; the silence continues.

Open breaches
  • B5: 11h+ silent while 'Investigating', zero incident.io updates, still nothing new a day later
  • A4: likely recurrence of INC-12436's bug class, not reflected in the incident record
  • C10/C11: partner given an explanation later found incorrect, never corrected; 3 newly-reported players unaccounted for
Proposed / pending
  • enforce add-before-deposit event ordering - proposed, unimplemented
  • scale scheduled-action-manager replicas - implemented, judged ineffective
  • PR #103 (Redis engine upgrade) - open, review disputed
Partner view
  • first reported 2026-07-12T10:51
  • last partner message unanswered
  • 9-player ID list delivered
  • scaling explanation given, later found not to fix the issue, correction never sent
Timeline (6)
  • 12 Jul: partner first reports via Intercom
  • 14 Jul 08:17-08:20: possible regression flagged, incident created
  • 14 Jul 12:35: root cause found (lost-event race condition)
  • 14 Jul 13:13-13:38: partner given scaling explanation + 9 affected IDs
  • 14 Jul 13:19-13:54: engineers privately conclude scaling fix doesn't work, partner never told
  • 14 Jul 15:05: last human message, 'TBC tomorrow' - still last message as of 15 Jul

→ Correct the record with the partner now that the scaling fix is known not to work, and confirm/credit the 3 newly-reported player IDs.

INC-13895 slackP2open 23h
[FIRING:1] Fusion API errors Alerting (spinbet-terragon: 401)

C9/B5: partner comms were already >4h late and the bot's silent-close nudge remains unanswered with no re-chase; 2nd Fusion API 401 incident in a week.

Fusion API 401 errors blocked on-site notifications/Rich Inbox for Spinbet Terragon. Same alert family as INC-12617 recurring a week later. Partner proactively notified once, ~4h9m after alert fired; no reply, no re-chase, bot silent-close nudge unanswered. No new activity found.

  • C9: partner notified ~4h9m after alert, well past ~40min target
  • B5: silent-close bot nudge still unanswered, no re-chase
  • A4: 2nd Fusion API 401 incident in a week (see INC-12617), not escalated to owning team

  • will update when more information available - still no follow-up sent
Timeline (7)

  • 14 Jul 09:22 -> Investigating, 10:24 lead accepted
  • 14 Jul 12:33 UTC partner informed, status -> Waiting on Partner
  • 14 Jul 12:42-12:46 UTC likely partner-side auth issue flagged
  • 14 Jul 13:12 UTC Nazareno takes over as lead
  • 14 Jul 18:22 UTC bot nudge unanswered
  • 15 Jul: no further activity

→ Re-chase the partner for the API-exchange info, now well over 24h since the ask, and respond to the unanswered bot nudge instead of letting it silently close.

INC-13917 slack intercomP2open 21h
Campeon: Slow processing on credit service (from lifecycles)

D15/C10: zero incident.io updates posted despite a confirmed root cause and an applied mitigation overnight; partner not told about either; Partner Manager's P1 request still unreflected in the record.

Campeon lifecycle coin-crediting delayed up to 2h on 11 Jul; root cause is auto-claim silently enabled on bonuses 147/199 plus a serializing credit path. Overnight, Daniel Lindengren handed off to Sam Lundborg before vacation with concrete next steps; Matteo then applied a temporary mitigation (scaled compute, raised maxReplicas) and formally transferred Lead to Sam Lundborg. None of this posted as an incident.io update or told to the partner.

Open breaches
  • D15/C10: zero incident.io updates posted despite confirmed root cause and applied mitigation; partner not told about either
  • A4/severity: Partner Manager's P1 request internally assessed 'Not a P1' via custom field, neither reflected in the record, still shown as plain P2
Proposed / pending
  • Temporary: scale credit-service compute/replicas - applied 15 Jul, holding
  • Permanent: credit VC directly vs auto-claim bonus - undecided, Linus/Daniel disagree
  • Add audit trail for Rewards bonus-config edits - raised, not tracked
Partner view
  • first reported 2026-07-14T11:18
  • Rewards team engaged, findings to follow - not yet delivered, partner not told about the mitigation either
Timeline (5)
  • 11 Jul: 82k-message campaign takes ~1h50m to drain vs usual 15-30min
  • 14 Jul 11:18 UTC: incident created P2, Partner Manager requests P1 treatment internally
  • 14 Jul: root cause traced to auto-claim flag + serialized credit path
  • 15 Jul 08:08-08:54 CEST: Daniel hands off to Sam Lundborg before vacation
  • 15 Jul 09:45 CEST: Matteo applies temporary scaling mitigation and formally reassigns Lead to Sam Lundborg

→ Post an incident.io update covering the mitigation and lead change, get Sam Lundborg to settle the VC-credit vs auto-claim decision, and inform the partner before the next silent-close nudge.

🟡 Watch 15

INC-13853 slack intercomP1open 26h

Partner (Rhino) raised a P1 believing FT/SOC had agreed to monitor a Pragmatic platform release; FT determined internally no such commitment existed, confirmed sync completion by end of day 14 Jul. Giancarlo formally closed the Intercom ticket with the partner at 06:11 UTC 15 Jul, closing the loop; CSAT survey auto-sent. incident.io status not yet updated to match.

INC-13916 slack intercomP1open 21h
[P1] Intercom Incident : BrazilBet Production

BrazilBet partner reported spoofed phishing emails using real player names/emails, asked FT to check for a breach. FT treated as P1 security, made channel private within minutes, ran a live investigation (WAF/edge, DB/ClickHouse, CRM audit, SendGrid) and found no IOCs on FT's side. Partner updated 3x via Intercom. No further activity found on incremental read - channel idle ~18h since moving to Monitoring.

Open breaches
  • D13: WAF IP-block action item still unconfirmed
  • D15: channel idle ~18h, no closing update or partner follow-up posted
Proposed / pending
  • Block 2 GCP scanning IPs at ambassador-brazilbet edge - proposed 14 Jul, no confirmation of completion seen
Partner view
  • first reported 2026-07-14T10:49
  • will reach out with new findings
Timeline (6)
  • 14 Jul 11:08 UTC partner substantive report
  • 14 Jul 11:19 UTC channel made private
  • 14 Jul 12:30 UTC WAF scanner-probe signal flagged
  • 14 Jul 13:57 UTC partner told investigation concluded, no IOCs found
  • 14 Jul 16:08 UTC status -> Monitoring
  • 15 Jul: no new activity, ~18h idle
INC-9820 slackP2open 28d
RDS OOM all brands - gradually increasing overtime

Fleet-wide RDS Performance Schema memory leak, fixed via PR #416 (merged 1 Jul), rolled out fleet-wide by 9 Jul. On 14 Jul the lead closed remaining gaps: the capping follow-up marked completed, and a new RAM/swap-alarm follow-up created and assigned to Simon Brown/SRE. Only one follow-up (activity-manager-go resilience) remains outstanding and unassigned.

Open breaches
  • A4: one follow-up (activity-manager-go resilience) remains outstanding and unassigned as closure nears
Proposed / pending
  • Cap Performance Schema memory (PR #416) - done, follow-up marked completed 14 Jul
  • RAM/swap alarm - now a tracked, assigned follow-up as of 14 Jul
  • activity-manager-go resilience fix - still outstanding, unassigned
Timeline (5)
  • 16 Jun: created, escalated P2
  • 01 Jul: PR #416 merged
  • 06-09 Jul: fleet-wide staged rollout
  • 14 Jul 13:35 UTC: capping follow-up marked completed
  • 14 Jul 16:01 UTC: new RAM/swap alarm follow-up created and assigned to Simon Brown/SRE
INC-14039 slackP2open 6h
Maxima: no consumers on queue maxima.singularity.clickhousewriter

D13/A4: known fix (increase & persist ClickHouse disk space) went unactioned ~5h47m after an auto-decline closed the incident before Gérard's recommendation was applied.

Maxima's ClickHouse writer queue backed up twice (93k then 27k unconsumed messages) due to insufficient ClickHouse disk space. Gérard Pelayo diagnosed the 'not enough space' error and recommended increasing/persisting disk allocation at 01:33 CEST, but the incident auto-declined 11 min later when the linked alert transiently resolved, and no one acted. ~5h47m later Joachim Farrugia noticed the queue backed up again, reopened, and applied the real fix (PVC 1380Gi->1600Gi).

Open breaches
  • D13: known root cause and fix recommendation went unactioned for ~5h47m after auto-decline closed the incident prematurely
  • A4: queue backed up twice (93k then 27k msgs) suggesting a capacity fix from a prior occurrence was not persisted
Proposed / pending
  • Increase/persist ClickHouse PVC size - Gérard's recommendation not acted on for ~5h47m, now applied as 1380Gi->1600Gi by Joachim
Timeline (7)
  • 01:29:42Z created, Gérard auto-assigned, acknowledged
  • 01:33:06Z Gérard recommends increasing/persisting disk allocation
  • 01:44:39Z incident auto-declined (linked alert resolved)
  • 05:31:44Z Joachim joins, monitoring
  • 06:26-06:27Z reopened (Declined->Triage->Fixing), INC-14076 merged in
  • 06:32-06:33Z PVC upgraded 1380Gi->1600Gi
  • 06:49:43Z remaining alert resolved

→ Confirm the PVC increase is persisted in IaC/config (not just a live scale-up), and review why auto-decline fired before Gérard's recommended action was executed.

INC-10810 slackP3open 19d
12play brands fire late

12play/we88 (Momentum) players received rewards 45-50min late due to RDS overload, a known daily 4pm choke pattern that finally got a real fix (4 PRs, 2 DB upgrades over 3 weeks). On 15 Jul, Daniel Lindengren posted a detailed, well-specified handover to Sam Lundborg before going on leave until 10 Aug, explicitly assigning the RabbitMQ-upgrade coordination and cutover steps - a properly executed handover, just not yet reflected in incident.io's lead/status fields.

Open breaches
  • D15: incident.io status stuck 'Fixing' since 10 Jul and Incident Lead field still shows Daniel Lindengren (now on leave) - the real handover happened in Slack but hasn't been reflected in the record
Proposed / pending
  • ClickHouse migration for active-challenges query - done
  • Content-variable reload-storm fix (PR #322) - merged
  • Rewards query split (PR #1914) - merged
  • crm-api caching (PR #2471) - merged
  • RDS instance upgrade - done
  • RabbitMQ 4.x + instance upgrade - date being coordinated with partner, cutover assigned to Sam Lundborg
Partner view
  • first reported 2026-06-24T16:00
  • update 12play via Intercom on fix progress - discussed internally, completion not confirmed
Timeline (4)
  • 25 Jun: incident created; daily 4pm RDS choke flagged as previously known
  • 30 Jun-9 Jul: PR #322, #1914, #2471 merged; DB instances upgraded
  • 10 Jul: Lead handed to Daniel Lindengren
  • 15 Jul 08:49 CEST: Daniel hands off to Sam Lundborg with a specific, actioned brief - completed fixes summarized, RabbitMQ upgrade needs partner-agreed date, Sam explicitly assigned the cutover
INC-12179 slackP3open 11d
failed to resolve container IP after 3 attempts

llm-agent tool execution failing on Daytona sandbox cold-resume. Root cause confirmed 4 Jul with high confidence; 4 ranked follow-ups filed same day. follow_up_list confirms none of the 4 fixes has shipped 11 days later; bot resolve-nudge unanswered.

Open breaches
  • A4: 3rd occurrence of this recurring failure class - all 4 follow-ups confirmed still outstanding 11 days after RCA
  • D14/D15: status stuck 'Investigating' since 4 Jul, bot resolve-nudge unanswered 8 days
Proposed / pending
  • probe toolbox data-plane (real fix) - outstanding
  • raise DAYTONA_EXEC_MAX_ATTEMPTS (band-aid) - outstanding
  • user-facing transient-error copy - outstanding
  • reduce cold-resume churn - outstanding
Timeline (4)
  • 03 Jul 13:19 alert fires, incident created P3
  • 04 Jul RCA posted + 4 follow-ups filed
  • 07 Jul bot nudge unanswered
  • 15 Jul: follow_up_list confirms all 4 follow-ups still outstanding
INC-12754 slackP3open 6d
Campeon Nexto unable to login

Campeon Nexto users couldn't log in due to a v2/v3 URL-version mismatch. Root cause found and workaround delivered within ~15 minutes; Patrik personally cleared Cloudflare cache and restarted crm-api same day, fix held. incident.io has sat in 'Fixing' P3 status for 7 days since, with no further activity.

Open breaches
  • D15/C10: incident.io stuck in 'Fixing' P3 status 7 days after the fix was confirmed working same day; bot nudge unanswered
Proposed / pending
  • clean URL/different browser workaround - delivered, effective same day
  • Cloudflare cache clear + crm-api restart - done 08 Jul
  • core-xp escalation floated - not clearly followed up
Timeline (5)
  • 08 Jul 14:25 incident created (P4)
  • 08 Jul 14:39-15:31: root cause found, workaround given, Patrik resolves same day
  • 10 Jul 14:17: severity raised P4->P3
  • 11 Jul 00:33: bot nudge unanswered
  • 15 Jul: no new activity
INC-12909 slack intercomP3open 5d
[P3] Intercom Incident : Galabet Production

Galabet partner reported players unable to claim reward bonuses. Investigation found the underlying bonus-code action was configured a day late; 340 bonuses credited but never claimed, pointing to a partner-side Rewards setup issue. Matteo proposed closing 14 Jul; partner has not yet confirmed. incident.io record received only one update since creation.

Open breaches
  • D15: incident.io record stale - only 1 update logged since creation despite substantive Intercom work
Proposed / pending
  • Correct Rewards/bonus-code action setup - recommended, not confirmed implemented
  • Close ticket - proposed 14 Jul, unconfirmed by partner
Partner view
  • first reported 2026-07-08T13:09
  • Rewards setup correction explained 10-13 Jul - fix not guaranteed
Timeline (5)
  • 08 Jul 13:09 partner reports
  • 09 Jul: escalated as P3, Matteo assigned lead, finds bonus-code action added a day late
  • 10 Jul: Matteo tells partner 340 bonuses credited but none claimed
  • 13 Jul: Matteo caveats fix isn't guaranteed
  • 14 Jul 14:28: Matteo proposes closing, partner has not confirmed
INC-13152 slack intercomP3open 4d
[P3] Intercom Incident : UW33 Malaysia Production

UW33 Malaysia partner's on-site notification CTA stopped working. Internal debate over JS-in-CTA-links restriction was never resolved, yet Matteo told the partner no service-side change was found. No activity for 3 days until a bot nudge reassigned lead to Matteo; nothing since.

Open breaches
  • D13: internal root-cause debate never resolved before answering the partner
  • C10: idle 3+ days post-answer, lead reassigned via bot nudge rather than proactive follow-up
Proposed / pending
  • confirm whether JS-in-CTA-links is blocked platform-side - never conclusively confirmed
  • suggest partner check front-end JS handling - given without internal confirmation
Partner view
  • first reported 2026-07-09T09:40
Timeline (4)

  • 10 Jul 08:29 UTC incident created P3
  • 10 Jul: engineers debate root cause, inconclusive; Matteo tells partner no FT-side change found
  • 13 Jul: bot flags no activity, lead reassigned to Matteo, no activity since
INC-13220 slack intercomP3open 4d
[P3] Intercom Incident : Slott Production [deleted]

Slott partner asked FT AI chat for a downloadable dataset; a widget bug truncated it. Fábio Silva manually delivered the data via Intercom; AI Team confirmed root cause and closed the Intercom ticket 14 Jul. incident.io still reads 'Investigating' with no activity since the 13 Jul lead handoff.

Open breaches
  • D15: incident.io untouched since 13 Jul handoff, still 'Investigating' despite Intercom closed 14 Jul
  • B5: escalation to Jeremy expired unacknowledged 10 Jul, picked up 3 days later via workflow
Proposed / pending
  • manual dataset delivery via LangSmith pull - done 10 Jul
  • AI Team fix for large-output truncation - in progress, no ETA

  • first reported 2026-07-09T15:09
  • code-block truncation fix - no ETA, confirmed 14 Jul

INC-13664 slack intercomP3open 46h
[P3] Intercom Incident : SBTSolutions Production

SBTSolutions reported delayed bonus/activity-trigger processing; Matteo migrated the messaging system to Kafka on 14 Jul morning without partner sign-off, then told the partner it would be scheduled with no action needed - misrepresenting work already done. No new activity since.

Open breaches
  • D15: stuck 'Waiting on Partner' since 13 Jul, not updated for the 14 Jul fix
  • C11: partner told migration would be scheduled when already silently applied
  • A4: same delay pattern recurred 11->13 Jul before permanent fix landed
Proposed / pending
  • Migrate to Kafka (root fix) - implemented 14 Jul, appears effective, not formally confirmed resolved
Partner view
  • first reported 2026-07-11T18:40
  • Kafka migration during low-traffic window, no partner action needed - told after already applied
Timeline (6)

  • 13 Jul 10:09 UTC incident created P3
  • 13 Jul 13:14 UTC root cause confirmed, Kafka migration proposed
  • 14 Jul 08:20-08:44 UTC Matteo applies Kafka migration without approval
  • 14 Jul 10:11-11:50 UTC partner asks about the already-applied migration; Matteo answers as if pending
  • 15 Jul 01:15 CEST bot nudge unanswered
INC-13931 slack intercomP3open 17h
[P3] Intercom Incident : G2 Production

G2 partner disputed a Welcome-Offer bonus (player 556, $42.60 vs $70). Nazareno built a plausible 'slots-only NGR' hypothesis but ~$3.80 stayed unexplained. Lead handed to Gérard E. Pelayo late 14 Jul with zero activity since; bot already nudging to auto-resolve.

Open breaches
  • C10: partner told 'escalating to tech team', no follow-up on inconclusive finding since
  • A4: 2nd occurrence of same NGR/bonus-calc pattern within ~4 days (see INC-13171), no permanent-fix ticket
Proposed / pending
  • slots-only NGR scoping theory - proposed, not confirmed
Partner view
  • first reported 2026-07-13T09:49
  • last partner message unanswered
  • escalate to tech team - done, no findings sent back since
Timeline (4)

  • 14 Jul 14:24-17:44 CEST support escalates, NGR reconstructed, slots-only theory proposed, $3.80 gap unresolved
  • 14 Jul 23:37 CEST lead handover to Gérard
  • 15 Jul 05:21 CEST bot auto-nudge to resolve
INC-10902 slackP4open 19d
H2Bet incidents - night - DO NOT CLOSE

Recurring H2Bet nightly ClickHouse-writer queue pileup, consolidated into this 'DO NOT CLOSE' bucket since 26 Jun. A separate log-volume config bug was fixed (PR #435), but the producer/consumer schema mismatch itself is still unfixed, and 2 more matching alerts merged in as recently as 12 Jul. The promised 'close Monday 13 Jul if stable' checkpoint has now passed by 2 days with no update.

Open breaches
  • A4: root-cause payload type-mismatch bug identified 26 Jun, still unfixed 19 days later; 2 more instances merged in as late as 12 Jul
  • D15: incident.io stale - no update since 9 Jul, promised 13 Jul checkpoint passed by 2 days unaddressed
Proposed / pending
  • Fix Status field schema/type mismatch end-to-end - still not implemented
  • ClickHouse log-volume config fix - done, PR #435 merged 9 Jul
  • Define sustainable autoscaling plan - no evidence of implementation
  • Restart/monitor, close if stable by 13 Jul - checkpoint passed without action
Timeline (5)
  • 26 Jun: grouped under this bucket, 28 alerts attached
  • 27 Jun: pileup recurs, RDS scaled, Status-field unmarshal error confirmed
  • 9 Jul: log-volume bug fixed (PR #435 merged); plan to close 13 Jul if stable
  • 12 Jul: 2 more matching alerts merged in
  • 15 Jul: no new activity; 13 Jul close-if-stable checkpoint passed by 2 days unaddressed
INC-10938 slackP4open 18d
Security incident: Malicious dashboard creation attempt

private — review directly

INC-13889 slack intercomP4open 24h
Calendars: Orphan (but live) door variations in the database(!)

12Play's Chinese comms profile appeared missing from the backoffice - a display bug only, no player-facing impact. Rewards team found root cause and opened two PRs 14 Jul. Daniel Lindengren posted a detailed handover to Sam Lundborg on 15 Jul before vacation; bot flagged that no incident summary has been set.

Open breaches
  • D15: incident.io still has no summary set and no formally claimed Incident Lead despite a detailed Slack handover
Proposed / pending
  • backoffice PR - opened 14 Jul, pending test
  • rewards-backend PR - opened 14 Jul, pending test
  • handoff to Sam Lundborg to verify both PRs 15 Jul

  • fix release tomorrow/Thursday - not yet confirmed done
Timeline (5)

  • 13-14 Jul: Rewards finds root cause (display bug, no data loss)
  • 14 Jul: incident created, partner told root cause+ETA, two PRs opened
  • 15 Jul 08:44 CEST: Daniel posts detailed handover to Sam Lundborg before vacation
  • 15 Jul 08:45 CEST: bot flags missing incident summary

🟢 Under control 3

2× P2 handled competently same-morning (INC-14082: RDS T4G downgrade traced & partner comms initiated within ~35min; INC-14069: root cause found, partner confirmed decommissioning, alerts to be silenced) — plus 1× P3 ping-pong noise incident (INC-14077) classified from metadata only, no breach.

INC-14069 slackP2open 2h
DMS: ftcrm-campeon-omega-production-reconciliation-user_consents-consent_email is missing

DMS heartbeat alerts fired because reconciliation jobs for Campeon-Omega stopped working (partner's Operator endpoint timing out). Joachim investigated, found the partner's own API unreachable, and confirmed with Siria Dorascenzi that Campeon-Omega is being decommissioned this week — no partner comms needed, alerts can go silent.

Proposed / pending
  • Silence/suppress Campeon-Omega reconciliation alerts once decommissioning completes this week
Timeline (6)
  • 05:45:10Z incident created; page to Gérard expired
  • 05:50Z Joachim picks up as lead
  • 05:55:43Z status -> Investigating
  • 05:55-06:59Z Operator API timeouts found
  • 07:03:07Z Joachim asks if Campeon-Omega still active
  • 07:16:52Z confirmed being decommissioned this week, no partner comms needed
INC-14082 slackP2open 68m
Some EUC Brands crashing due to 'Too Many Connections'

Multiple EUC-hosted brands (Betamina, AviroGroup, Hyperwin, Vegas-Glory) crashed across AM Time, Singularity Time and Scheduled-Actions Live due to 'Too Many Connections' DB errors. Lead Joachim Farrugia triaged fast, correlated the failures across brands, and traced the cause to RDS instance downgrades to T4G on the affected brands within ~34 minutes of creation. Six related single-brand incidents were merged into this one.

Proposed / pending
  • Root cause pinned to RDS T4G downgrade; no rollback/remediation action documented yet
Partner view
  • last partner message unanswered
  • Joachim: 'I will inform the partners in the meantime' at 07:43:52Z — not yet confirmed sent
Timeline (6)
  • 07:09:45Z incident created, lead Joachim Farrugia auto-assigned
  • 07:32:04Z status -> Investigating
  • ~07:33-07:41Z brands/services confirmed; 6 related incidents merged in
  • 07:43:02Z root cause identified: RDS instance downgrades to T4G
  • 07:43:52Z Joachim states he will inform partners
  • 07:44:43Z 2 attached alerts auto-resolved
INC-14077P3open 111m
[FIRING:1] Ping Pong: Singularity → Fire latency high (60s/15m) sisutech (true p3 ping-pong)

Known P3 ping-pong noise pattern on sisutech; lead assigned (Joachim Farrugia), fresh (~1h old), no other criteria matched. Classified from metadata only, not deep-read.
